scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@futurespark/constants --workspace=@futurespark/enums --workspace=@futurespark/types --workspace=@futurespark/logger --workspace=@futurespark/response --workspace=@futurespark/utils --workspace=@futurespark/cache --workspace=@futurespark/queue --workspace=@futurespark/events --workspace=@futurespark/middleware --workspace=@futurespark/validators --workspace=@futurespark/database --workspace=@futurespark/authentication && npm run build --workspace=@futurespark/gateway --workspace=@futurespark/auth-service --workspace=@futurespark/learning-service --workspace=@futurespark/communication-service --workspace=@futurespark/payment-service --workspace=@futurespark/analytics-service --workspace=@futurespark/integration-service
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "analytics,auth,comm,gateway,integration,learning,payment" -c "blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,white,red" "npm run dev -w @futurespark/analytics-service" "npm run dev -w @futurespark/auth-service" "npm run dev -w @futurespark/communication-service" "npm run dev -w @futurespark/gateway" "npm run dev -w @futurespark/integration-service" "npm run dev -w @futurespark/learning-service" "npm run dev -w @futurespark/payment-service"
